title: Open Cloze: The History of Chocolate

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym wyrazem, tak aby otrzymac spojny, logiczny i poprawny jezykowo tekst. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow.
tasks.title: THE HISTORY OF CHOCOLATE
tasks.text: Chocolate is one of 1.1. _________ most popular sweets in the world. It was first used 1.2. _________ the ancient Maya and Aztec people in Central America. They made a bitter drink 1.3. _________ cocoa beans, which was very different from the chocolate we eat today. When Spanish explorers arrived in Mexico in the 16th century, they brought cocoa beans back 1.4. _________ Europe. At first, only rich people 1.5. _________ afford to buy chocolate because 1.6. _________ was extremely expensive. However, 1.7. _________ the 19th century, new machines were invented that made chocolate cheaper to produce. A Swiss chocolatier added milk 1.8. _________ chocolate in 1875, and this new type became very popular. Today, 1.9. _________ than seven million tonnes of chocolate are consumed every year. Most people do not know that 1.10. _________ takes about 400 cocoa beans to make just one bar of chocolate.
